src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Register the new Platform class for serialization in GraalVM native image runtime hints to ensure it works correctly at runtime.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/handler.general_idea: Add a new GET /platform endpoint to expose the runtime platform (JVM or NATIVE) via environment property.
Inject Spring Environment bean to access configuration properties for the new platform endpoint.
Import the Platform model class used by the new endpoint.
Import the Spring Environment class required for dependency injection.
Remove static import of ServerResponse.ok() in favor of explicit class reference.
Replace static ok() calls with explicit ServerResponse.ok() calls.

src/test/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Add a test assertion to verify that the Platform class is registered for serialization in the runtime hints configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent dependency from 3.0.1 to 3.4.4 to support Java 21 and access newer features.
Add Spring Boot Actuator to enable health checks and monitoring endpoints.
Add the Spring Boot Testcontainers starter to modernize integration testing infrastructure.
Add BlockHound to detect blocking calls in reactive streams during testing.
Remove the explicit Testcontainers BOM management as it is likely handled by the Spring Boot parent or the new starter.
Rename the default Docker image tag suffix from 'webflux' to 'jvm' to clarify the runtime type.
Configure the Maven Surefire plugin with specific JVM arguments to allow method redefinition, likely for testing compatibility.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Add specific formatting rules for YAML files to enforce tab indentation and UTF-8 encoding.

.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the checkout action to v4 to align with modern GitHub Actions standards.
Explicitly configure the runner to use JDK 21, which is required for the application to compile and run on the target platform.
.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.human_impl:
uses: actions/setup-java@v4
with:
    distribution: temurin
    java-version: 21

.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the CodeQL initialization action to v2.
Upgrade the CodeQL autobuild action to v2.
Upgrade the CodeQL analysis action to v2.

LICENSE.general_idea: Update the copyright year in the license file to reflect the current year.

README.md.general_idea: Update documentation to reflect the migration from Java 17 to Java 21.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Java 17' to 'Java 21' in the project description.

README.md.general_idea: Update documentation to reflect the upgrade to Spring Boot 3.4.x.
README.md.human_impl: Updated Docker image tags from '3.0.1' to '3.4.4' in run commands.

README.md.general_idea: Standardize terminology from 'Graal Native' to 'GraalVM Native' for accuracy.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'Graal Native Image' with 'GraalVM Native Image' in headers and descriptions.

README.md.general_idea: Update installation instructions to use a GraalVM distribution compatible with Java 21.
README.md.human_impl: Changed SDKMAN install command from '22.3.r17-nik' to '21.0.2-graalce'.

README.md.general_idea: Update the recommended Redis Docker image version in setup instructions.
Update documentation to reflect the infrastructure change from Nginx to Traefik for load balancing.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced references to 'NGINX' with 'Traefik' in descriptions and link definitions.

README.md.general_idea: Replace outdated Heroku and generic Docker badges with specific JVM and GraalVM build status badges.
README.md.human_impl: Swapped Heroku/DockerHub badges for 'Docker JVM Build' and 'Docker GraalVM Native Build' shields.

README.md.general_idea: Document support for multi-architecture Docker images.
README.md.human_impl: Added note stating 'Docker Image for JVM base is available for AMD64 and ARM64 architecture'.

README.md.general_idea: Update the copyright year to the current year.
Update the Heroku deploy button to point to the correct legacy branch for older versions.
README.md.human_impl: Added '?template=.../tree/spring-boot-web-2.3' to the Heroku deploy URL.

README.md.general_idea: Add links to the previous Spring Boot 3.2.x version in the history section.
README.md.human_impl: Added a new list item for 'Spring-Boot 3.2.0: Java-11 Reactive JVM & GraalVM Native version'.

build.sh.general_idea: Changed the script shebang from the portable env-based path to a direct path with interactive mode flag.
Enabled shell option to expand aliases within the script, likely to support interactive commands or specific build tool aliases.

mvnw.general_idea: Make the Maven wrapper script executable to allow direct execution from the command line.

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Replaced the static Nginx load balancer with Traefik to enable dynamic service discovery and routing via Docker labels.
src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Removed 'nginx' service and added 'reverse-proxy' service using 'traefik:v2.10.5' with Docker provider enabled.

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Updated the Redis container image from version 6.0.9 to 7.2.3 to align with newer infrastructure standards.
Updated application Docker image tags to reflect the new Spring Boot 3.4.4 version and specific runtime types (JVM/Native).
src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed image tags from '2.5.2-native' to '3.4.4-jvm' and '3.4.4-native'.

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Consolidated three identical application instances into two distinct services (JVM and Native) using Docker Compose replicas for scaling.
src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Replaced 'spring-chat-1', 'spring-chat-2', 'spring-chat-3' with 'spring-chat-jvm' and 'spring-chat-native' each having 'deploy: replicas: 2'.

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Updated environment variable prefixes from 'SPRING_REDIS_' to 'SPRING_DATA_REDIS_' to match Spring Boot 3.x configuration property naming conventions.
Added a 'RUNTIME_PLATFORM' environment variable to distinguish between JVM and Native execution contexts in the application.
src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'RUNTIME_PLATFORM=JVM' to the JVM service and 'RUNTIME_PLATFORM=NATIVE' to the Native service.

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Added Traefik-specific labels to services to define routing rules and disable proxying for internal services like Redis.

src/main/k8s/configMap.yaml.general_idea: Update environment variable prefixes from SPRING_REDIS to SPRING_DATA_REDIS to align with Spring Boot 3.x property binding conventions.
